title: Event
description: A public program, class, or exhibition at an NYPL location. Surfaced today through the Locations API events link (refinery.nypl.org/.../locations/{id}/events) and the nypl.org/events calendar. Reconciled here as a clean resource so an agent can answer 'what's happening at my branch this week?'. Keyed on eventId; joined to a Branch by slug.

eventType.description: Program type (e.g. Class, Author Talk, Story Time, Exhibition).

audience.description: Intended audience (e.g. Adults, Children, Teens, All Ages).

eventLink.description: Public nypl.org/events page for the event.
